rag_rules: Fix type mismatches in guarantee expressions by ensuring boolean types where required
Resolve unresolved identifiers in AGREE contracts by using only visible AADL features or declared helpers
generic_rules: Validate that all AGREE expressions match expected types (bool, int, real) before execution
Ensure component-level contracts only reference features available at that scope
Avoid introducing package-qualified identifiers not present in the model's configured dependencies
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Guarantee expressions must evaluate to boolean type; use proper comparisons for type alignment
anti_patterns: Do not add architecture elements to fix unresolved references; instead, correct or remove invalid clauses
Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes unless they are valid outputs
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
AGREE annex placement and scope rules for component types
